subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. In these days, from every quarter have petitions and letters arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی و عنایتی این ایام از هر شطری عرایض و مراسلات رسیده از
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @wisdom [hikmat], @consultation, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
